performanceNotes: Buffed Dragon Ascent fires off extremely fast and deals absurd damage, even through resists like Mega Metagross
Won repeatedly even from negative leads; only Mega Metagross is called a corebreaker for the team
Zacian closes games hard with Close Combat against Lugia, Pulkia, and Zekrom

sources.videoTitle: *BUFFED* Mega Rayquaza is ABSURD in the Mega Master League! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: HomeSliceHenry

description: Mega Rayquaza lead with a Lunala safe swap and Zacian in the back. Rayquaza abuses the buffed Dragon Ascent (110 power / 45 energy) for fast, massive damage, Lunala pivots in for Spatial Rend/Lugia coverage with Shadow Ball, and Zacian cleans up with Close Combat and Behemoth Blade.
